race.comment: PRINCESS SAKIKO (6) resumes having gone to the paddock a maiden winner at Terang. She's expected to improve this time around and can measure straight up. SALIZOU (7) was okay first up at Pakenham behind a handy one in Barari who has gone on with it since. She's been given a freshen since then and has plenty of upside, respecting. ENDLESS SUMMER (1) is off a let-up since running at Randwick Kensington in April. He's a former Japanese gelding who creates interest down in grade. THE OPPORTUNIST (4) resumed over 1000m at Pakenham Synthetic last start and finished 5 lengths back in tenth. Fitter and can atone.
